title: CTM Dye Depot
description: Continuity and Dye Depot Mod Compatability. Now you can have connected glass!
body:
## CTM DYE DEOPT ##

Do you want connected glass? Are you using Dye Depot? Well... YOU ARE IN LUCK! 

Stained glass added from Dye Depot can now have connected glass textures!

All Rights Reserved to Ninni for Texture of Glass
